title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pratham Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pratham Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
